• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with AI-generated answers via Puter
  • 5 selectable answer personalities: friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast
  • 3D WebGL particles and shake animation during answer loading
    onclick="askQuestion()"
    puter.ai.chat(systemPrompt)

This web application simulates a classic Magic 8 Ball with AI-powered responses. Users can select from five distinct answer personalities to customize the tone of replies. The app includes 3D particle effects, a shake animation during queries, and displays brief answers inside the animated 8-ball.
